things.name: Golden Temple (Harmandir Sahib)
things.description: Sikhism's most sacred shrine - gold-plated temple on a sacred lake open 24 hours

things.name: Langar (Golden Temple Free Kitchen)
things.description: World's largest free community kitchen serving 100,000 people daily - volunteer and eat

things.name: Wagah Border Ceremony
things.description: Theatrical flag-lowering ceremony at the India-Pakistan border every sunset

things.name: Jallianwala Bagh Memorial
things.description: Garden where British troops massacred 379 unarmed civilians in 1919 - bullet holes remain

things.name: Partition Museum
things.description: World's first museum dedicated to the 1947 India-Pakistan Partition

things.name: Durgiana Temple
things.description: Hindu temple on a sacred lake modelled on the Golden Temple

things.name: Ram Bagh Garden & Museum
things.description: Summer palace and gardens of Maharaja Ranjit Singh with his weapons

things.name: Old City Heritage Walk
things.description: Narrow lanes of the walled city with textile merchants and haveli architecture

things.name: Akal Takht (Throne of the Timeless)
things.description: Seat of temporal authority of the Sikh religion opposite the Golden Temple

things.name: Amritsari Kulcha & Lassi at Kesar da Dhaba
things.description: Stuffed bread baked in a tandoor with chickpea curry and a tall glass of sweet lassi
